0.text: Diffuse centriacinar nodular opacities with ill-defined margins bilaterally in the lung parenchyma

1.text: Multiple patchy ground-glass nodular opacities in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Multiple patchy ground-glass nodular opacities in the lateral and medial segments of the middle lobe

3.text: Multiple patchy ground-glass nodular opacities in the superior-posterior segment of the right lower lobe
